## Summary

What does this pull request change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Security control (broker, policy, filter, audit, provenance, approval)
- [ ] Test only
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Security impact

- [ ] No change to security controls
- [ ] Changes security controls (describe invariant and tests below)

If security controls changed, list the invariant and test names:

## Tests

- [ ] `make validate` run locally and passed
- [ ] New or updated tests describe the security behavior in the test name
- [ ] No tests skipped, xfailed, or weakened

## Documentation

- [ ] README or `docs/` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No unsupported security claims added

## Repo hygiene

- [ ] No prompt artifacts, AI transcripts, IDE metadata (`.cursor/`), or validation scratchpads committed
- [ ] No `AGENTS.md`, `PROJECT_DOCTRINE.md`, or master-prompt files committed
- [ ] No secrets, real credentials, or unsafe payloads
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_repo.py` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] Python 3.12 compatible
- [ ] No emojis in code or documentation
- [ ] No TODOs in core logic
